name: Bayer Konfidor
description: Effective insecticide for aphids and whitefly control

name: Syngenta Actara
usage_instructions: Mix thoroughly and spray ensuring good coverage

description: Nitrogen and sulphur fertilizer for better crop growth

description: Efficient drip irrigation system for water conservation
